nasb.text: And when He had said this, He breathed on them and *said to them, “Receive the Holy Spirit.

esv.text: And when he had said this, he breathed on them and said to them, “Receive the Holy Spirit.

cnv.text: 說了這話，就向他們吹一口氣，說：“你們領受聖靈吧！

ccb.text: 然后祂向他们吹了一口气，说：“你们领受圣灵吧！

csbs.text: 说了这话，耶稣向他们吹了一口气，说：“领受圣灵吧！
